name: BLACK IRON
description:
TUSK

>Hello [REDACTED], Welcome to the Black iron access command panel. Input a command to begin<

>Initiate.Flashback/Document.City<

>Flashback Initiated..<

>Core memories rebuilding...<

>Searching for document: The city.<

>Retriving classified document on: The city.<

>Retrieval successful<

>Memory Playback: Active<

>Flashback In progress.<

<FLASHBACK REBUILT:>

The City

August 14, 2019: 12:48 PM

The one of many cities to be collateral in this outbreak of the infection, A once lively city turned to a mere ghost town in days.

That tower being the epicenter of this all, unleashing a widespread infection that we can't contain, along with the secondary facility that we lost to the infected.

The survivors and infected here seem to be an interesting group from the rest, based from the far observation by Dr. [REDACTED], with the remaining population being able to seemingly return from death from deadly accidents or when killed while infected by others.

Its been seen as well that the survivors were able to get ahold of weapons that aren't from this world. These weapons seemed to be only from media and fiction.. fascinating.

The infected, the infected have seemed to gotten interesting mutations to its body... to presumably lure and catch any living individual into a untimely demise.

Dr. [REDACTED] also reported spotting mysterious hooded infected roaming around the city, and the only single feature he could make out of these hooded infected were:

A orange and black hood infected with a massive fire-esque sword on its back.

A yellow infected with a golden hood and a yellowish long sword.

A black and Wisteria colored infected with a similarly colored Wisteria hood, wielding bright ninja stars.

A black and bright green infected with a green hood and accompanying crimson eyes. This one having a very long glitchly sword.
creator: [-Downturner56-]
